name: libhttp-negotiate-perl
title: libhttp-negotiate-perl
description:
implementation of content negotiation
HTTP::Negotiate provides a complete implementation of the HTTP content
negotiation algorithm. Content negotiation allows for the selection of a
preferred content representation based upon attributes of the negotiable
variants and the value of the various Accept* header fields in the request.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libhttp-negotiate-perl because implementation of content negotiation.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libhttp-negotiate-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libhttp-negotiate-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libhttp-negotiate-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
